user.title: Hookii Neomow
user.description:
Sign in with your Hookii app account. The integration connects to the Hookii cloud directly - no add-on and no MQTT broker needed - and adds your mowers plus the live Neomow Map card.

Note: Hookii allows only one active session per account, so while this integration runs the phone app may get signed out periodically.

data_description.email: The email you log into the Hookii app with.
data_description.password: Your Hookii app password. Stored locally and only sent (MD5-hashed) to the Hookii cloud.
data_description.env: Use 'beta' unless your account lives on the production cloud.
data_description.serials: Only needed if no mowers are found automatically. Comma-separated, e.g. HKX1EB100JD25010115, HKX2EB100JD24080170. Find them in the Hookii app under each mower's details.

error.auth: Login failed. Check the email, password and cloud environment.
error.no_mowers: Login succeeded but no mowers were found on this account.

abort.already_configured: This Hookii account is already configured.
